findings.title: /robots.txt publicly accessible
findings.description: /robots.txt returned content that may reveal hidden paths or site structure.

evidence.request:
GET http://127.0.0.1:8000/robots.txt
Headers({'host': '127.0.0.1:8000', 'accept': '*/*', 'accept-encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'user-agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'})
evidence.response_snippet:
HTTP 200
Headers({'host': '127.0.0.1:8000', 'date': 'Sat, 30 May 2026 20:00:11 GMT', 'connection': 'close', 'content-type': 'text/plain; charset=UTF-8', 'content-length': '127'})

User-agent: *
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /api/admin
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /.env
Disallow: /.htaccess

findings.remediation: Review robots.txt / sitemap.xml for sensitive paths. Do not rely on robots.txt for security.

Disallow: /admin

findings.title: Exposed endpoint found: /.htaccess
findings.description:
GET http://127.0.0.1:8000/.htaccess returned 200 OK. Body snippet: <IfModule mod_rewrite.c>
    <IfModule mod_negotiation.c>
        Options -MultiViews -Indexes
    </IfModule>

    # Deny access to dotfiles (.htaccess, .env, etc.)
    RewriteRule ^\. - [F,L]

    R

evidence.request:
GET http://127.0.0.1:8000/.htaccess
Headers({'host': '127.0.0.1:8000', 'accept': '*/*', 'accept-encoding': 'gzip, deflate, br, zstd', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'user-agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'})
evidence.response_snippet:
HTTP 200
Headers({'host': '127.0.0.1:8000', 'date': 'Sat, 30 May 2026 20:00:22 GMT', 'connection': 'close', 'content-length': '823'})

<IfModule mod_rewrite.c>
    <IfModule mod_negotiation.c>
        Options -MultiViews -Indexes
    </IfModule>

    # Deny access to dotfiles (.htaccess, .env, etc.)
    RewriteRule ^\. - [F,L]

    RewriteEngine On

    # Handle Authorization Header
    RewriteCond %{HTTP:Authorization} .
    RewriteRule .* - [E=HTTP_AUTHORIZATION:%{HTTP:Authorization}]

    # Handle X-XSRF-Token Header
    RewriteCond %{HTTP:x-xsrf-token} .
    RewriteRule .* - [E=HTTP_X_XSRF_TOKEN:%{HTTP:X-XSRF-Token}]

    # Redirect Trailing Slashes If Not A Folder...
    RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-d
    RewriteCond %{REQUEST_URI} (.+)/$
    RewriteRule ^ %1 [L,R=301]

    # Send Requests To Front Controller...
    RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-d
    RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-f
    RewriteRule ^ index.php [L]
</IfModule>

findings.remediation: Restrict access or remove exposed administrative/debug endpoints.
